title: croton subfragilis
intro: Croton subfragilis, also known as the small-leaved croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Croton subfragilis include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Croton subfragilis include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
